key_insights.insight: Insufficient sleep can cause you to lose more muscle than fat when dieting.
key_insights.quote: If you're not getting sufficient sleep, then 60% of all of the weight that you lose will come from lean muscle mass and not fat.

key_insights.insight: Caffeine masks sleepiness by blocking adenosine, but the sleepiness chemical continues to build up, leading to a 'caffeine crash'.
key_insights.quote: Caffeine races in it latches onto the adenosine receptors and blocks the signal of adenosine...when the caffeine finally gets metabolized...it's that plus all of the adenosine sleepiness that's been building up during that time in between.

key_insights.insight: Drinking coffee, primarily decaf, is beneficial due to the high antioxidant content of coffee beans, notably chlorogenic acid.
key_insights.quote: It is so strikingly clear that coffee,drinking coffee is a good thing for you from a health perspective...it's got nothing to do with the caffeine...antioxidants.

key_insights.insight: Sleep deprivation significantly increases cravings for unhealthy foods by impacting hormone levels, reward centers, and endocannabinoid production.
key_insights.quote: What they found is that when you are underslept,you eat more of everything, but you especially eat moreof these heavy hitting stodgy carbohydrates,bread, pasta, pizza.

key_insights.insight: Dreaming during REM sleep is essential for emotional processing, allowing the brain to strip away the emotional intensity of difficult experiences.
key_insights.quote: Dream sleep does is then it takes that useful emotional memory and it will detox the emotion from the memory. It strips the bitter emotional rind from the informational orange.

key_insights.insight: Chronotypes are genetically determined, and societies benefit from having variability in chronotypes, resulting in having a certain percentage of the population awake at any given time.
key_insights.quote: We know that right now there's at least 22 differentgenes that dictate what you are, morning type, evening type, or somewhere in between... when we're in a tribe, if we all sleep at the same time, we're all vulnerable for eight hours.

key_insights.insight: A 'sleep divorce' can improve sleep quality in couples with mismatched chronotypes, which in turn can improve their intimacy and sex lives.
key_insights.quote: When a couple is sleeping well, we know that the sex hormones are improved... what we found is that for an hour of extra sleep, if a woman gets an hour of extra sleep, her libido desire to be intimate with her partnerincreases by 14%.

actionable_advice.advice: Dim down lights in the last hour before bed.
actionable_advice.how_to: Switch off half to three-quarters of the lights in your home to signal to your brain that it's time for sleep.
Go to bed and wake up at the same time every day, even on weekends, to regulate your brain's expectations.
Aim for a bedroom temperature of 18-18.5 degrees Celsius (65-68 degrees Fahrenheit) to facilitate a drop in core body temperature, essential for falling and staying asleep.

actionable_advice.advice: If you struggle to fall back asleep, get out of bed and do something relaxing
actionable_advice.how_to: After 30 minutes of wakefulness, leave the bedroom and engage in a relaxing activity, like reading, or meditation.

actionable_advice.advice: Remove clock faces from the bedroom
actionable_advice.how_to: Knowing the exact time when you are struggling to fall asleep adds utility.

memorable_stories: NASA's nap studies in the 1980s led to the implementation of NASA naps in its terrestrial workforce
The story of how sleep stories saved the Calm meditation app.
contrarian_claims: The claim that one can catch up on sleep on the weekend is false because that sleep debt accrues and compounds.
Caffeine is not a miracle drug with no cost.
Drinking coffee is healthy as long as it's not excessive.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - Matthew Walker: The World’s No.1 Sleep Expert (The 6 Sleep Hacks You NEED!)
